{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47386", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-362", "name": "Concurrent Execution using Shared Resource with Improper Synchronization ('Race Condition')"}], "description": "### Summary
Two concurrent token-exchange requests using the same OAuth authorization code could
each mint a distinct valid `(access_token, refresh_token)` pair, breaking the
single-use guarantee that PKCE relies on.

### Details
The token-exchange flow read `is_used` and called `markAsUsed` as an unconditional
update at the end of the path. A new `OAuthAuthorizationCode.claimByCode` method now
performs an atomic compare-and-swap (`WHERE code = ? AND is_used = false`) and is
called immediately before `OAuthToken.insert`, after redirect-URI, PKCE, and client
authentication have all succeeded. Only the first concurrent caller's `UPDATE` wins;
the rest see `invalid_grant: Authorization code has already been used`.

### Impact
An attacker who has observed an authorization code and the corresponding PKCE
verifier (for example through a malicious OAuth-aware client or by racing a real
exchange) could obtain a long-lived refresh token in addition to the legitimate one.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@eddieran](https://github.com/eddieran).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00197, "percentile": 0.0958}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8m7c-hf24-5g47", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:20:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8m7c-hf24-5g47", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8m7c-hf24-5g47"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47386"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:20:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-8m7c-hf24-5g47", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.05.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8m7c-hf24-5g47"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-8m7c-hf24-5g47", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: OAuth Authorization Code Race Condition", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T16:20:32Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8m7c-hf24-5g47", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.05.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.05.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: OAuth Authorization Code Race Condition
